ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c), $Permission.PRPProductStrategy = true, RecordType.DeveloperName = 'DesignAndProposal', ISPICKVAL(HasPerfFees__c, 'True'), OR(ISBLANK(MaxPerfFees__c), ISBLANK(EffectivePerfFees__c), ISBLANK(PerformanceFeeMethod__c), ISBLANK(PerfFeesRefPeriod__c), ISBLANK(PerfFeesCrystallisationFreq__c )) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: If Has Perf Fees='True', you must provide values for all of the following fields : Max Perf Fees, Effective Perf Fees, Performance Fee Method, Perf Fees Ref Period and Perf Fees Crystallisation Freq
